# AVP-Dev — Portfolio & Technical Blog of Aliaksei Patskevich

> Personal portfolio and technical blog of Aliaksei Patskevich (Alexios Odos), a Software Engineer specializing in custom web development, AI integration, and modern frontend architecture. The site is bilingual (English and Russian) and built on Astro 5 with hybrid SSR+SSG rendering.

## Homepage

- [Portfolio & Services (EN)](https://avpdev.com/en/): Main English homepage with services overview, tech stack, portfolio highlights, and contact form.
- [Портфолио и услуги (RU)](https://avpdev.com/ru/): Главная страница на русском языке с описанием услуг, навыков и формой обратной связи.

## Blog

- [AI for Business: 5 Integration Scenarios That Pay Off in 2026](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/ai-business-integration/): Practical AI use cases delivering real ROI — from RAG search to secure two-contour systems and conversion optimization.
- [AI-Friendly Code Architecture](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/ai-friendly-code-architecture/): 5 software design rules for codebases that LLMs can easily understand and co-author without accumulating technical debt.
- [Custom Development vs Template: Which to Choose?](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/template-vs-custom/): Comparison of template-based websites (Tilda, WordPress) vs custom development for business needs.
- [5 Website Development Principles That Save Business Budget](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/5-principles-of-development/): Fundamental principles: from strategy and prototyping to launch and long-term maintenance.
- [7 Website Elements That Convert](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/7-website-elements-that-convert/): Key conversion-focused design and content elements for business websites.
- [Mobile Speed Is a Sales Killer](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/mobile-speed-sales-killer/): How page load speed on mobile directly affects conversion rates and revenue.
- [Custom CRM ROI in 2025](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/custom-crm-roi-2025/): Why custom CRM systems outperform off-the-shelf solutions in terms of return on investment.
- [Custom CRM Security and Backups](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/custom-crm-security-backups/): Security architecture and backup strategies for custom-built CRM/ERP systems.
- [AVP-Dev Case Study](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/avpdev-case-study/): Behind-the-scenes look at building this portfolio site as a reference architecture.
- [Ghost in the Machine](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/ghost-in-the-machine/): Reflections on AI as a capable but dangerous student in software development.
- [All Blog Posts (EN)](https://avpdev.com/en/blog/): Full index of all English articles.
- [Все статьи блога (RU)](https://avpdev.com/ru/blog/): Полный список статей на русском языке.

## Projects

- [Projects Portfolio (EN)](https://avpdev.com/en/project/): Completed client projects across web-sites, apps, CRM/ERP systems, and Telegram Mini Apps.
- [Портфолио проектов (RU)](https://avpdev.com/ru/project/): Реализованные проекты на русском языке.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://avpdev.com/en/legal/privacy-policy/): Data handling and privacy practices for this website.
- [Cookie Policy](https://avpdev.com/en/legal/cookie-policy/): Cookie usage policy and consent information.

- [Sitemap](https://avpdev.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full XML sitemap with all indexable pages.

- [Telegram](https://t.me/AVP_Dev): Direct contact channel for collaboration and inquiries.
